form.formComment: Alex Forbes trained three-year-old gelding lining up for first race start. Won a recent trial at Avondale. Inside barrier will assist chances. Beautifully drawn and looks primed to play a major role.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Alex Forbes trained three-year-old gelding lining up for first race start. Won a recent trial at Avondale. Inside barrier will assist chances. Beautifully drawn and looks primed to play a major role.

form.formComment: Gelding by Swiss Ace making his first appearance. Was runner-up in a trial at Ellerslie on March 10 over 800m. Don't rule him out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Swiss Ace making his first appearance. Was runner-up in a trial at Ellerslie on March 10 over 800m. Don't rule him out.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 10 at Matamata on March 22 over 1200m, slow going 5.5 len behind Rioja carrying 58kg at $27.10. The run before that 7th of 11 at Te Aroha on March 6 over 1150m, slow going 5 len behind Arwen with 58kg at $25.60. Tested on recent form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Last start 5th of 10 at Matamata on March 22 over 1200m, slow going 5.5 len behind Rioja carrying 58kg at $27.10. The run before that 7th of 11 at Te Aroha on March 6 over 1150m, slow going 5 len behind Arwen with 58kg at $25.60. Tested on recent form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had to be steadied off heels near the 150m.
Blundered leaving the barriers. Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Three-year-old gelding (Ardrossan - Agooddeal) will no doubt benefit from the four trials prior to his debut today. Fourth over 1000m in an Avondale trial on March 24. Hasn't shown a great deal in trials leading up to this and inclined to invest in others barring market push.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Three-year-old gelding (Ardrossan - Agooddeal) will no doubt benefit from the four trials prior to his debut today. Fourth over 1000m in an Avondale trial on March 24. Hasn't shown a great deal in trials leading up to this and inclined to invest in others barring market push.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Racing well recently. At the latest run 2nd of 10 at Matamata on March 22 over 1200m, slow going 4 len behind Rioja carrying 54kg at $3.30. The run before that held ground to the line 2nd of 11 at Te Aroha on March 6 over 1150m, on a slow track; 0.1 len behind Arwen with 54kg at $5.10. Sure to be tough to beat.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Three-year-old filly making debut by Capitalist out of Shadow Watch. Won a trial over 950m at Tauranga on January 13. Following that fifth over 900m in a Taupo trial on March 17. Capable of a solid performance.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At debut, sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 11 at Matamata on March 22 over 1400m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Typhoon Lucy with 56kg at $8.50. Sure to play a major role.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, 7th of 11 at Hawera on February 27 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Ledhaven Cassie carrying 56kg at $6.70. Last start 6th of 10 at Matamata on March 22 over 1200m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Rioja with 56kg at $21.10. Has ability and can get off the mark this time.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when second last of 11 at Ruakaka 2yo SWP on July 12 over 1200m, on heavy track; 22 len behind Yokozuna carrying 55kg at $16.70. Might be better off following this outing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made the bend awkwardly near the 850m hampering Belle Noire.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when got back early 7th of 9 at Arawa Park on August 13 over 1230m, on rain affected going; 8 len behind Churmatt carrying 54.5kg at $29. Looks tested at this stage.
